ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bus_aggregations" (
  "bus_agg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bus aggregation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bus aggregation */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the bus aggregation is located */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Total capacity of the bus aggregation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bus_agg_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interconnections" (
  "interconnect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interconnection point */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the interconnection point */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interconnection point */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Maximum capacity of the interconnection point */,
  "voltage_level" REAL /* Voltage level at the interconnection point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interconnect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the plant type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plant type */,
  "average_lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of plants of this type */,
  "average_efficiency" REAL /* Average efficiency of plants of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_operational_params" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operational parameter set */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the power generation plant */,
  "Pmax" REAL /* Maximum power output */,
  "Pmin" REAL /* Minimum power output */,
  "Qmax" REAL /* Maximum reactive power output */,
  "Qmin" REAL /* Minimum reactive power output */,
  "ramp_agc" REAL /* AGC ramp rate */,
  "ramp_10" REAL /* 10-minute ramp rate */,
  "ramp_30" REAL /* 30-minute ramp rate */,
  "ramp_q" REAL /* Ramp rate for reactive power */,
  "temperature_coefficient" REAL /* Impact of temperature on performance */,
  "wind_speed_coefficient" REAL /* Impact of wind speed on performance (for wind plants) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_cost_params" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost parameter set */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the power generation plant */,
  "GenFuelCost" REAL /* Fuel cost for generation */,
  "GenIOB" REAL /* First input/output coefficient for generation */,
  "GenIOC" REAL /* Second input/output coefficient for generation */,
  "GenIOD" REAL /* Third input/output coefficient for generation */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Annual maintenance cost */,
  "depreciation_cost" REAL /* Annual depreciation cost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status record */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the power generation plant */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Status of the plant (1 for online, 0 for offline) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the status record */,
  "reason_for_status_change" TEXT /* Reason for the status change (e.g., maintenance, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_cost_coefficients" (
  "coefficient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost coefficient set */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the power generation plant */,
  "mu_Pmax" REAL /* First cost coefficient for maximum active power */,
  "mu_Pmin" REAL /* First cost coefficient for minimum active power */,
  "mu_Qmax" REAL /* First cost coefficient for maximum reactive power */,
  "mu_Qmin" REAL /* First cost coefficient for minimum reactive power */,
  "seasonal_adjustment" REAL /* Seasonal adjustment factor for cost coefficients */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coefficient_id")
)
